zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Catterall Lady是Alan Catterall和Isabella de Halton的女兒，於1379年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾格亞特 米頓。她於1384年與Thomas Talbot III在英國英格蘭越可爾格亞特 米頓結婚。她去世於1411年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年32歲。

nameMeanings.name: Catterall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Catterall in Lancashire, possibly named from Old Norse kattar-hali ‘cat's tail’, referring to a long, thin piece of land.

variants.name: Gatrell
meanings: English (Isle of Wight and Hampshire): possibly a voiced variant of the habitational name   Catterall  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Catterall Lady was born in 1379, in Great Mitton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Alan Catterall and Isabella de Halton. She married Thomas Talbot III in 1384, in Great Mitton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She died in 1411, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Catterall Ladyは1379年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアグレアト ミットオンでAlan CatterallとIsabella de Haltonの娘として生まれた。1384年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアグレアト ミットオンでThomas Talbot IIIと結婚した。彼女は1411年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Catterall Lady(은)는 1379년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 그리트 미턴에서 Alan Catterall(와)과 Isabella de Halton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1384년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 그리트 미턴에서 Thomas Talbot III(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1411년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Catterall Lady родилась в 1379 г. в местности грит миттон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Alan Catterall и Isabella de Halton. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Talbot III в 1384 г. в местности грит миттон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1411 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет.
